data.title: Alibaba's Q4 Shakeup: Many Asian Funds Exit While US-Based Funds Like UBS O'Connor, Marathon, AssetMark, Cantor Fitzgerald Double Down
data.description: Alibaba saw huge inflows from U.S.-based funds during Q4 but many Asian funds exited BABA despite its progress in the AI arena.

data.title: Analog Devices, Philips And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Wednesday
Trump Announces 25% Tariff On Auto Imports, Chips And Pharmaceuticals, Shaking Global Trade: Nvidia, Apple, TSMC And Others In Focus
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has announced his intention to impose a 25% tariff on auto imports, alongside chips and pharmaceuticals, causing a stir in international trade.

data.title: Pepe Bull Questions Traders Selling Frog-Themed Memecoin: 'They'll FOMO Back In Higher Than They Sold'
data.description: A widely followed cryptocurrency trader highlighted the so-called "Cycle of Regret" phenomenon on Tuesday, in which traders selling Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE) in the ongoing corrective phase will struggle to reenter the market at the right time.

data.title: Tesla Cybertruck Receives 5-Star Safety Rating: 'Apocalypse-Level Safe,' Says Elon Musk
data.description: The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) on Monday gave Tesla's stainless steel Cybertruck a 5-star overall safety rating.
